steps.title: Find the slope
steps.content:
Use the table points $(-3,0)$ and $(0,-15)$:
$$
m=\frac{-15-0}{0-(-3)}=-5
$$
The point $(0,-15)$ gives the $y$-intercept.

steps.title: Write the function
steps.content: With slope $-5$ and $y$-intercept $-15$, the function is $$ f(x)=-5x-15 $$ Factor out $-5$: $$ f(x)=-5(x+3) $$ The answer is C.
